You're given a plot of land and infinite money to design your dream house! What are you creating?

One-story, ranch style (bedrooms on one side, living space on the other. None of this main-bedroom-is-off-of-the-kitchen-shenanigans). Huge kitchen with an island, top of the line appliances using gas (give me fire!). At least 4 bedrooms and 4 bathrooms. All the bedrooms will have walk in closets and all the bathrooms will have walk-in showers with a built-in bench, steam, and non slip everything. Heated tile or engineered wood floors EVERYWHERE. Energy efficient EVERYTHING! Solar panels and rain barrels. Tons of windows to let in natural light, but blackout blinds/curtains too. 
And a moat, with a drawbridge, with electric eels… to keep everyone out
A mini water park that kind of surrounds the house and a standard 2, maybe 3, story house with those train rides for maximum lazy
A house big enough for 2 guest rooms and a large family room for friends to visit. Then, a shop that's as big as the house so I can work on any type of projects I want to!
Only here to do the survey
Space elevator to put Elon musk SpaceX out of business

A modern barndominium compound on 100 acres with three private wings—our home, my in-laws’, and my sister-in-law’s—each with its own entrance, garage, kitchen, laundry, and patio. The homes connect through an open-air but covered breezeway courtyard with timber beams, seating, and outdoor gathering space. Outside: wraparound porches, pool, fire pit, volleyball/basketball court, stocked pond, trails, pasture, orchard, garden, and a large workshop—private space with room to gather as a family.
A giant house with a huge yard for the kids to run around in. Too many secret passages and fun rooms to count.

The largest dog sanctuary ever so I can get as many as possible out of rescues, kennels, and negative environments.
(also a little street course so I can continue some light aggressive rollerblading)
I’ll just take the money, someone else can design the house

Something that looks and feels like the Burrow (the Weasley home in Harry Potter) but is actually super comfortable and luxurious to live in without sacrificing any of the kooky character. Rooms bolted on at different heights, twisty wooden staircases and windows in random places etc, but also six en-suite bedrooms, a library, a music studio/cinema room, a playroom and an indoor swimming pool. It would feel completely unique and be a gorgeous and fun place to live.
Studio ghibli house/ cottage type house
My demands are pretty straightforward - fully automatic house with auto filling of products at the kitchen, good internet and magnificent view of the mountain forest with lake outside window 
One of those Italian palaces on the cliffs of lake Cuomo, with the big fairytale terraces.

I'm creating a Victorian mansion with castle walls and a greenhouse full of plants. Inside is full of historical artifacts and artworks. Everything is dark wood and there's a massive, multifloor library. I want to live my dream witchy/vampire/immortal aristocrat life, and when I'm gone I want it to terrify local kids who say the man who lived there still walks the halls and if you listen carefully you can hear him recite Vine memes.
A big house with a giant basement to house my friends
At this point a nuclear bunker

I'm making a cozy 3-bed detached house. It will have a sitting room with a nice log fire place, and a theatre room with a true atmos sound system. I'll make sure the kitchen is a good size as well for hosting friends, and one of the bedrooms will be kept as a guest room so people can crash whenever they want!
